title: crassula × hybrida
intro: Crassula × hybrida, also known as Jade Plant or Lucky Plant, is a hybrid succulent plant that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help soothe wounds and reduce infection. The health benefits of Crassula × hybrida include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cognitive function, and even help manage stress and anxiety, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing with carrier oils to create topical creams and ointments.
